steps.title: Set up equations and choose concrete values
steps.content:
From the percentages: $a = 21.84(b + c)$ (2,184% = 21.84) and $b = 0.84c$ (84% = 0.84).
To simplify arithmetic, let $c = 100$. Then:
  • $b = 0.84 \times 100 = 84$
  • $b + c = 184$
  • $a = 21.84 \times 184 = 4,018.56$

steps.title: Calculate the ratio as a percentage
steps.content:
Find what percent of $b$ is $a$:
$$\frac{a}{b} = \frac{4,018.56}{84} = 47.84$$
Converting to a percentage: $47.84 \times 100\% = 4,784\%$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
